rationale: Acting on Review 1 requires generalizing/renaming AlgPoints (a new definition reusing →ₐ directly with no Mathlib/TauCeti duplicate) per an external unshown roadmap, which is a forward-looking naming preference with no reuse violation in the diff; Review 2's sound approve (no findings) yields an equivalent merged PR, as the difference is neither a real current duplication nor material enough for a maintainer to require the edit.
